issues.description: Action type is SearchDeck with destination 'board', but card text says 'place at the bottom of the owner's deck'. Should use a different action that places card at deck bottom, not searches to board.
Filter is ByCost but missing the card kind 'Character'. Text specifies 'Character with a cost of 4 or less', so filter must include kind:'Character'.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Place up to 1 Character with a cost of 4 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck.
